message:
Last winter, I remember the evening the snowstorm was predicted to hit. I was busy making dinner when I suddenly thought, "What if the power goes out?" I quickly rummaged through my kitchen drawer and found a stash of candles and matches I had tucked away during a previous storm. 

I lit a few candles, and as the snow began to fall, I felt a cozy calm wash over me. Instead of worrying about what could happen, I brewed some hot cocoa and we all gathered around the table, sharing stories by candlelight. It turned into one of those rare family nights filled with laughter and warmth, despite the chilly chaos outside.

That little moment made me realize that sometimes, being prepared can lead to unexpected joys. A small win that saved the day! Have you had any little wins during a storm? Share your stories!
